## How to verify

- [ ] `bash -n install.sh` passes (if installer touched)
- [ ] `python -m pytest bot/tests/` passes (if updater code touched)
- [ ] `docs/INSTALL.md` updated if the installer's behavior, flags, or manifest schema changed
- [ ] All 7 locale READMEs updated (en/ko/zh/ja/es/de/fr) if user-facing README content changed
- [ ] CI green on this PR before merge
